utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes: destination (present), travel_dates (present), transportation (present but not flight details; it lists a tourist card and cost, so it does not meet 'flight details with costs'), accommodation (present with name and cost), activities (present but without costs, requirement is 'selected activities with costs'), additional_services (present with details, costs not required by spec but says 'with costs'; here no costs provided), total_budget (present but lacks a complete cost breakdown). Fully specified check: 1) destination: fully specified. 2) travel_dates: fully specified. 3) transportation: not fully specified (no flights). 4) accommodation: minimally specified with name and cost—acceptable. 5) activities: not fully specified (no costs). 6) additional_services: not fully specified (no costs). 7) total_budget: not fully specified (no breakdown). Therefore, fully specified items = 3 (destination, travel_dates, accommodation) out of 7 total.
